summary: Quiet day for model launches — GPT-5.2 and Claude 4.6 remain baseline. OpenAI Frontier (enterprise platform) shipped. Red teaming: new jailbreak detection paper uses internal representations to block 78% of attacks. Voice AI research: PhysioSER introduces physiology-informed emotion recognition for TonalityIQ. Competitive intel: Moov AI's STM project confirmed. Lead: Mirco Ravanelli (SpeechBrain creator) card ready for outreach.

highlights.title: OpenAI Frontier — Enterprise AI Platform
highlights.summary: New platform for complex workflows. Launch clients: HP, Intuit, Oracle, Uber, Cisco, T-Mobile.
highlights.relevance: Their enterprise play — we position boutique custom vs platform

highlights.title: Jailbreak Detection via Internal Representations
highlights.summary: Paper shows jailbreaks leave detectable patterns in hidden layer activations. 78% blocked, 94% benign preserved. No fine-tuning needed.
highlights.relevance: Bastion: implement latent-based success detection for CTF evals

highlights.title: PhysioSER: Physiology-Informed Vocal Emotion Recognition
highlights.summary: Quaternion-based model using amplitude + phase. 14 datasets, 10 languages, real-time validated on robots.
highlights.relevance: TonalityIQ: adapt quaternion architecture for stress detection

highlights.title: Jailbreak-Zero: Policy-Based Red Teaming
highlights.summary: Shift from example-based to policy-based adversarial generation. Higher ASR vs GPT-4o/Claude 3.5.
highlights.relevance: Bastion: move from static prompts to policy-driven generation

highlights.title: GGML + llama.cpp join Hugging Face
highlights.summary: Major consolidation for edge/on-prem AI. Feb 20 announcement.

highlights.title: Moov AI STM Project Confirmed
highlights.summary: Metro ridership prediction on Orange Line deployed. Mentoring-heavy model.

tech_research.title: Jailbreaking Leaves a Trace
tech_research.summary: Tensor-based latent framework detects jailbreaks from hidden activations without fine-tuning. Architecture-agnostic.
tech_research.relevance: Auto-detect successful jailbreaks in bastion CTF evals

tech_research.title: PhysioSER
tech_research.summary: Physiology-informed SER using quaternion convolutions on amplitude + phase. Tested on 14 datasets, 10 languages.
tech_research.relevance: Quaternion architecture for stress detection — novel approach

tech_research.title: Jailbreak-Zero
tech_research.summary: Policy-based red teaming with preference-optimized attack LLM. Pareto-optimal coverage.
tech_research.relevance: Move bastion from static prompts to policy-driven generation

tech_research.title: SpeechBrain Emotion Recognition
tech_research.summary: Pre-trained wav2vec2-IEMOCAP model available. 78.7% accuracy. Plug-and-play.

events.title: NeurIPS 2026 — Call for Papers
events.summary: Submission deadline approaching. Workshops on agentic AI, red teaming.

business_opportunities.title: OpenAI Frontier Launch
business_opportunities.summary: Enterprise platform with tier-1 clients. Signals where big tech is placing bets.
business_opportunities.relevance: Position against: we do boutique custom, not platform

business_opportunities.title: Moov AI STM Project
business_opportunities.summary: Metro ridership prediction deployed on Orange Line. Mentoring-heavy model.
business_opportunities.relevance: Competitor intel: they own public sector

research_montreal.name: Mirco Ravanelli
research_montreal.title: Assistant Professor, Concordia
research_montreal.research: SpeechBrain creator, conversational AI, deep learning for speech
